title: SCHWEPE CI/CD DEPLOYMENT FIX REPORT

summary.issue: Coolify deployment failing due to server permissions and configuration
summary.rootCause: Coolify server cannot write .env and docker-compose.yaml files
summary.impact: Production URLs returning 404, application not accessible

fixesRequired.title: Fix Coolify Server Permissions
fixesRequired.description: Coolify server cannot write application configuration files
actions: SSH into Coolify server as root
Test write access: sudo -u coolify touch /data/coolify/applications/test

fixesRequired.title: Configure Coolify Application
fixesRequired.description: Ensure correct Dockerfile and settings in Coolify
actions: Set Build Command: npm run build

verificationSteps: Trigger deployment via GitHub Actions or manual
nextActions: CONTACT COOLIFY ADMIN to fix server permissions
UPDATE COOLIFY CONFIGURATION with correct settings
TEST DEPLOYMENT once permissions are fixed
